summary: Frontend testing COMPLETE for ChangesLog redesign. All requested features verified working: 4 KPI cards with X/total format for unchanged, 3 tabs (added/modified/removed) replacing flat list, tab switching, empty state for removed tab, zone cards with icon/code/name, active tab indicator bar.

kpi_cards.kpi_added: PASS - data-testid='kpi-added' shows count (4) in green
kpi_cards.kpi_removed: PASS - data-testid='kpi-removed' shows count (0) in red
kpi_cards.kpi_modified: PASS - data-testid='kpi-modified' shows count (56) in amber

tabs.no_unchanged_tab: PASS - 'بدون تغيير' tab correctly removed from tab bar

tab_content.removed_tab_empty: PASS - changes-content-removed shows empty state message

tab_switching.switch_to_modified: PASS - Tab switches correctly showing 56 zone cards
tab_switching.switch_to_removed: PASS - Tab switches correctly showing empty state
tab_switching.switch_to_added: PASS - Tab switches correctly showing 4 zone cards

active_indicator.indicator_exists: PASS - Active tab indicator bar exists (bottom-0, h-3px)
active_indicator.indicator_color: PASS - Indicator has correct color (rgb(34, 197, 94) for added tab)

zone_cards.card_content: PASS - Zone cards show icon, code (ف-0-36), and name (مصلى)
zone_cards.card_format: PASS - Zone code contains dash format

critical_code_review_comments: ChangesLog component correctly implements 4 KPI cards in grid layout at lines 48-73
KPI 'unchanged' card correctly shows X/total format with `{count} / {totalZones}` at line 68
3 tabs (added/modified/removed) correctly defined in useMemo at lines 14-18
Tab bar correctly uses data-testid attributes for testing (changes-tab-{key})
Active tab indicator bar implemented with absolute positioning and 3px height
Empty state correctly shown for tabs with 0 zones at lines 150-158
Zone cards correctly display icon, code, and name with hover effects
seed_data_creation: None - using existing sessions on Feb 18 (4 added, 56 modified, 0 removed, 0 unchanged)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 tested ChangesLog redesign: 1) 4 KPI cards (مضاف/محذوف/معدّل/بدون تغيير) with بدون تغيير showing X/total format. 2) 3 tabs (مضافة/معدّلة/محذوفة) with count badges replacing flat list. 3) Active tab has colored indicator bar at bottom. 4) Tab switching works correctly. 5) Empty state shown for tabs with 0 zones. 6) Zone cards have icon, code, and name. All tests passed on Feb 18 session with 60 zones.
